x-enumeration-literals.name: Content Development
x-enumeration-literals.description: Assemble and format training content for all suitable media

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Scheduling
x-enumeration-literals.description: Schedule training, allocating available training resources to meet demand

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Delivery
x-enumeration-literals.description: Execute training sessions and self service training using al appropriate mechanisms

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Evaluation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Solicit trainee feedback and assess the impact of training efforts to guide future content development
